content_body:
Don't Miss Out On Your Chance To Save 15% This Weekend!

Take advantage of this offer in 2 easy steps:

1. Choose one of the cabins on this page.

2. Book online or call 706-632-2246 and make a reservation for this weekend using the offer code 10215.

 

*This offer is only valid for new reservations for the weekend of October 2nd, 2015. The 15% discount applies to the nightly rate.
title: Last Minute Deal For AdWords
